title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 13 2025
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 13 2025
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 13 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 13/01/2025
Today, iron ore fluctuated upward. The most-traded contract I2505 closed at 768.5 yuan/mt,up 1.92% for the day. Traders showed moderate enthusiasm for selling, while steel mills remained cautious and purchased as needed.
